'''Cas Ennyl Yllek''' was an employee and liaison for the [[House Benelex]] on [[Paqualis III/Legends|Paqualis III]]. She hired [[Jodo Kast]] for Sava Brec Madak, the identity used by [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] in his plan to kill Kast.

{{Char-stub}}
